name: Lately FM
explanation: A 2-operator FM voice with selectable operator waveforms, in the Yamaha TX81Z lineage. Distinct from sine-only FM synths: choosing non-sine operator waves (half-sine, abs-sine, quarter, even, square-ish) gives reedy, buzzy, hollow timbres — the famous 'Lately Bass'. A modulator with feedback phase-modulates a carrier, both using the selected wave, with a brightness (modulator) decay and ADSR. 8-voice poly. Controls: Wave (operator waveform), Ratio, FM Depth, Feedback, Decay and Level.
